title: Genius-InventoryControl
description: Genius-InventoryControl is plugin that helps staffs with checking player's inventories and ender chests
body:
This plugin isn't being updated anymore, and for it to work 100% you need my other plugin [Genuis Core](https://modrinth.com/plugin/genius-core). But I just added this feature to the Genius Core plugin

Genius InventoryControl is plugin that helps staffs with checking player's inventories and ender chests


commands:
-
- /invsee [player] | _Allows a player to view others inventories._
  - Aliases: /inventoryview, /inventory, /iv
- /enderchest [player] | _Allows a player to view others Ender Chests._
  - Aliases: /ec, /echest

permissions:
- 
- genius.inventory.use.others | _Allow a player to view others inventories._
- genius.deny.others.view.inventory | _Deny others from viewing their inventory._
- genius.enderchest.use.others | _Allow a player to view others ender chests._
- genius.deny.others.view.enderchest | _Deny others from viewing their ender chest._
